component.name: CrossHook
component.summary: Launch Windows game trainers alongside Steam/Proton titles

description.p: CrossHook is a native Linux launcher for Windows game trainers. It discovers Steam libraries across every mounted drive, matches trainers to their target games, and coordinates the launch of both the game (via Proton or Wine) and the trainer so they share a prefix, wine server, and runtime environment.

ul.li: Automatic Steam library discovery, including external drives
Per-profile Proton / GE-Proton selection and download manager
Community trainer tap support with git-backed updates
Optional network isolation via user namespaces for untrusted trainers
Gamescope wrapper and Steam Deck friendly layout

description.p: CrossHook itself is a native Linux application. It orchestrates Proton/Wine to launch Windows executables — it does not run under Wine or Proton.
Pre-Flatpak maintenance release. See the CHANGELOG for full details.
